task_description: Stack the cubes on the pink plate from bottom to top: Orange, Yellow, Green and Blue cubes.

objects_identified.name: orange-cube-1
objects_identified.description: an orange cube initially on the cyan plate with the green cube on top

objects_identified.name: yellow-cube-1
objects_identified.description: a yellow cube initially on top of the blue cube

objects_identified.name: green-cube-1
objects_identified.description: a green cube initially on top of the orange cube

objects_identified.name: blue-cube-1
objects_identified.description: a blue cube initially on the cream plate with the yellow cube on top

objects_identified.name: pink-plate-1
objects_identified.description: the empty pink plate that is the target base for the final stack

objects_identified.name: cream-plate-1
objects_identified.description: a cream plate supporting the initial blue and yellow cube stack

objects_identified.name: cyan-plate-1
objects_identified.description: a cyan plate supporting the initial orange and green cube stack

reasoning: The task requires stacking four cubes on the pink plate in bottom-to-top order: orange, yellow, green, blue. In the scene, the yellow cube is on the blue cube, and the green cube is on the orange cube. The blue cube rests on a cream plate, the orange cube rests on a cyan plate, and the pink plate is empty and clear. The domain already contains the colored cube types, but specific colored plate types are added for the pink, cream, and cyan plates.
updated_domain:
(define (domain vlmrobobench)
  (:requirements :strips :typing)
  (:types
    cube cloth plate bowl mat paper - object
    purple-cube blue-cube orange-cube yellow-cube green-cube - cube
    pink-plate cream-plate cyan-plate - plate
  )
  (:predicates
    (on-top-of ?o1 - object ?o2 - object)
    (hand-empty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (clear ?o - object)
  )

  (:action pick
    :parameters (?obj - object ?underobj - object)
    :precondition (and
      (hand-empty)
      (clear ?obj)
      (on-top-of ?obj ?underobj)
    )
    :effect (and
      (holding ?obj)
      (clear ?underobj)
      (not (hand-empty))
      (not (on-top-of ?obj ?underobj))
      (not (clear ?obj))
    )
  )

  (:action place
    :parameters (?obj - object ?target - object)
    :precondition (and
      (holding ?obj)
      (clear ?target)
    )
    :effect (and
      (on-top-of ?obj ?target)
      (hand-empty)
      (clear ?obj)
      (not (clear ?target))
      (not (holding ?obj))
    )
  )
)
problem_pddl:
(define (problem vlmrobobench-stack-cubes-on-pink-plate)
  (:domain vlmrobobench)

  (:objects
    orange-cube-1 - orange-cube
    yellow-cube-1 - yellow-cube
    green-cube-1 - green-cube
    blue-cube-1 - blue-cube
    pink-plate-1 - pink-plate
    cream-plate-1 - cream-plate
    cyan-plate-1 - cyan-plate
  )

  (:init
    (on-top-of blue-cube-1 cream-plate-1)
    (on-top-of yellow-cube-1 blue-cube-1)
    (on-top-of orange-cube-1 cyan-plate-1)
    (on-top-of green-cube-1 orange-cube-1)
    (clear yellow-cube-1)
    (clear green-cube-1)
    (clear pink-plate-1)
    (hand-empty)
  )

  (:goal
    (and
      (on-top-of orange-cube-1 pink-plate-1)
      (on-top-of yellow-cube-1 orange-cube-1)
      (on-top-of green-cube-1 yellow-cube-1)
      (on-top-of blue-cube-1 green-cube-1)
    )
  )
)
